name: Kahlua Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef or lamb; cut into 1-inch strips or cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Skewer the meat.
2. Mix all other ingredients in a blender until smooth.
3. Baste the kabobs well and cook over charcoal.
4. Turn and baste until the meat is tender. About 10-15 minutes for cubes, or 5-10 minutes for strips.
5. Serve with the extra sauce either hot or cold for dipping. Serves 4-6 people.
